name: Trello
title_tag: Integrate Trello with Synup to Automate Your Review Management Process
detailed_paragraph:
Trello + Synup

Transform your approach to customer review management by integrating Trello’s intuitive project management platform with Synup’s advanced review acquisition and management solutions.

What is Trello?

Trello is a user-friendly project management tool that employs boards, lists, and cards to organize and prioritize projects and tasks, facilitating a visual and collaborative workflow that enhances productivity and team synergy.

Why Trello + Synup?

  • Visual Review Planning: Utilize Trello’s visual boards and cards to map out review acquisition strategies and workflows, ensuring clarity and coherence in execution.
  • Dynamic Review Boards: Create dedicated Trello boards for managing and tracking customer reviews, enabling a structured and organized approach to review management.
  • Automated Review Cards: Leverage Trello’s automation capabilities to generate and manage review tasks efficiently, ensuring timely and systematic review solicitations and follow-ups.
  • Collaborative Review Handling: Foster a collaborative environment where team members can engage, discuss, and strategize on review content directly within Trello’s interactive boards.
  • Customized Review Workflows: Customize Trello cards and lists to adapt to the specific nuances of each review, allowing for personalized and effective review management.
  • Actionable Review Insights: By integrating with Synup, ensure that review insights and actions are clearly visualized and actioned within Trello’s adaptable workspace.

Pairing Trello with Synup unlocks a vibrant and interactive arena where the visualization, organization, and collaboration of review management tasks and strategies are markedly enhanced, leading to a more effective and cohesive review acquisition process.

How to integrate Trello + Synup?

Trello integration for review acquisition is available to all Synup subscribers. To view and manage the integration:

  • Visit the Review acquisition tab on Synup's console.
  • Click on Connect CRM or App Button.
  • Select the Folder or location you want to connect Trello to.
  • Authenticate your CRM.
  • Finish setting up CRM.
  • Create Review acquisitions using contacts from CRM.

‍
